problem id: 7a5d00a7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00010000 -> 01000000
  11011010 -> 01101110
  01111011 -> 11101111
  00001010 -> 00101000
  10100100 -> 10010101
  00110111 -> 11011101
  01111001 -> 11100111
  10011011 -> 01101000
  01101000 -> 10100011
  00001110 -> 00111000

query: 11111101
predicted answer: 11110011
